title: Job Context
description: Shared job-context schema. flowType is canonical (matches both pilot repos' real field name); workflowType is accepted as a synonym for compatibility with the original portfolio-model proposal. See compat/reqon-mapping.md and compat/aim-mapping.md.

jobId.description: Reqon: a UUID. AIM: a date-slug (YYYY-MM-DD-<slugified-title>). Either shape is valid.

project.description: Not present in either pilot repo's current context.json (each repo only ever holds its own jobs). Required going forward so a shared tool can disambiguate jobs across repos.

direction.description: Free-text requested outcome and context, as given by the human at job intake.

flowType.description: First 6 values are the pilot repos' existing enum values. Remaining values are additions this standard's workflows require (performance-audit, security-review are not yet recognized by either pilot's orchestrator - see workflows/performance-audit.md and workflows/security-review.md).

workflowType.description: Synonym for flowType, accepted for compatibility with the original source proposal's schema naming. If both are present, flowType wins.

riskLevel.description: Not present in either pilot repo today. Optional; see agents/shared/risk-and-autonomy.md for the default mapping to autonomy tier.

autonomyLevel.description: Optional explicit override of the riskLevel-derived default.

surfaces.description: Reqon: web board / mobile web / iOS / Chrome extension / backend / marketing. AIM: dashboard pages, API. Free-form per project.

constraints.description: Reqon: array. AIM: single free-text string. Both accepted - see compat mapping docs.

requiredLenses.description: Optional. Advisory lenses (agents/reviewers/*.md or project-specific) PM has determined this job must invoke.

acceptanceHints.description: Optional early hints toward acceptance criteria, refined by PM into the actual acceptance criteria in the product brief.

screenshots.description: Reqon-specific today (filenames of decoded screenshot attachments); schema-neutral for other projects to adopt.

projectContext.description: Free-form project-specific extension point, so a project never needs to fork this schema to add a field it needs.
